SEARCH
Package model

Class Client

java.lang.Object
model.Client
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Client extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a Client interacting with the cruise system.
Author:
Santiago

  • Constructor Details

    • Client

      public Client()
      Default constructor for creating an empty client structure.

    • Client

      public Client(String idClient, String nameClient, String surnameClient, int ageClient, int phoneClient, String emailClient)
      Complete constructor for creating a populated client entity.
      Parameters:
      idClient - The unique ID (DNI/Passport) of the client.
      nameClient - The given name of the client.
      surnameClient - The surname of the client.
      ageClient - The age of the client.
      phoneClient - The primary phone number.
      emailClient - The email address.
